name: Cheese Delights
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F.
Set out a baking sheet.
Mix cheese and butter until well blended. Stir in flour and salt, then mix well.
Add Rice Krispies and work in by hand.
Divide dough into half, then cut each half into 15 pieces. Roll each piece into a ball, placing on baking sheet, and flatten with a fork.
Bake in the preheated 350°F oven for about 10 minutes.
Makes at least 30 snacks.
Store in a sealed container (like an empty coffee can).
